As Jupiter is of Golden colour, and is aspected by the Sun in exaltation,
the native will be reddish in colour.
Saturn is conjunct the Sun and there is Mercury in the second. Conse
quently the native will have a job in a commercial concern. The concern will
be recognised by the Government (Sun in exaltation with Saturn).
CHART 412
Jupiter placed in Libra aspects
Saturn in Aries. This is good. The Sun Moon Sun
Sat.
has Venus in the second to him in Mer. Dh.
Cancer. The Moon, lord of Cancer, is
in Taurus and so there is exchange of Ven.
places between the Moon and Venus.
This gives Venus a placement in a
Mars
subtle way next to Saturn. As a result
in the year, in which the native was
born, the father had lucky times and Dt. Jupt.
had good financial benefits.
As Saturn, significator of profession, is aspected by Jupiter, the native •
will be employed in a decent post. Next to Saturn-Mercury's conjunction with l
Moon indicates the native to be a very popular person.
